summary.key_theme: Cisco 憑藉 AI 與資料中心強勁需求，以及針對 AI 時代推出的資安創新產品，獲得分析師看好並帶動股價表現。

bullish.title: Cisco (CSCO) Rated Buy on Strong AI and Data Center Demand
bullish.reason: BofA Securities 給予買進評級，主要基於 AI 與資料中心基礎設施的強勁需求，顯示市場對其核心業務轉型具備信心。

bullish.title: Cisco Reimagines Security for the Agentic Workforce
bullish.reason: 於 RSA 大會宣布針對 AI 代理工作流程的資安創新，有助於推動資安部門的長期成長動能。

bullish.title: Cisco Systems Inc (NASDAQ:CSCO) Shows High Technical and Setup Ratings for Potential Breakout
bullish.reason: 技術面顯示股價處於緊縮整理型態，具備潛在突破機會，吸引技術派投資人關注。

bullish.title: How Cisco Systems (CSCO) Story Is Shifting With Margin Pressures And Higher Valuation Hopes
bullish.reason: 分析師調升目標價，反映市場對其估值重估的期待，儘管存在利潤壓力，但成長故事正轉向 AI 驅動。

bullish.title: Cisco Systems (CSCO) Laps the Stock Market: Here's Why
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，顯示近期買盤強勁，市場情緒偏向樂觀。

bullish.title: A Look At Cisco (CSCO) Valuation As Shares Trade Below Estimated Fair Value
bullish.reason: 股價交易價格低於估計公允價值，提供投資人潛在的價值投資空間。

bearish.title: Cisco Bets on New Portfolio to Reignite Security Growth: What's Ahead?
bearish.reason: 儘管有新產品布局，但營收下滑 4 % 與成本上升的壓力仍是短期營運的隱憂。

neutral.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為市場關注度提升的報導，未提供具體利多或利空訊息，屬中性資訊。

neutral.title: Cisco Systems Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
neutral.reason: 描述股價相對表現，雖當日下跌但優於同業，屬於市場波動的客觀敘述。

neutral.title: Cisco Community Push Puts 40 Communities Initiative In Investor Focus
neutral.reason: 關於企業社會責任的長期計畫，對短期股價影響有限，屬中性消息。
